titleStmt.title: SII 9.100: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 100. (A.R. No. 193 of 1913.) ON A STONE IN FRONT OF THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE IN HAVINAHALU-VIRAPURA, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 967, Pārthiva, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 5, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1045 August 5, Monday in the reign of the Chālukya king Āhavamalladēva. It records that Udayāditya-Sindarasa made a gift of taxes in the village Doṇḍavaṭṭi, while the king's feudatory Traiḷōkyamalla-Nanni-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permānaḍidēva, “lord of Kāñchī”, was ruling the nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
siṁdara datti
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa traiḷōkyamalla śrīmadāhavamalla
dēvarssukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda pallavānvaya śrī
prithvīvallabha pallavakulatiḷakanamōghavākya kāṁcīpura
varēsvaraṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamallananninoḷaṁbapallava
permmānaḍidēvar nāḍanāḷdu sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāma
nta kaliyugarēvanta nannigāśraya samaramahē
svara bhōgāvatīpuravarēsvara mattagajama
nīkamanuṇḍa bi
rudara javaṁ birudamanneyavēśyābhojaṁga nāmā
disamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmadudeyādityasi
ndarasaru sakhavariṣa 967 neya pārtthivasaṁvatsarada śrā
vaṇa bahuḷa paṁcami sōmavāradandu doṇḍavaṭṭiyūro
ḍeya pālimayya doṇḍavaṭṭiyalu manneya sāmyada te
ṟeyellamaṁ biṭṭu manneyaṁ sarvanamasyavāge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ geydu
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ sindara holegeṟe
yendu biṭṭu koṭṭar
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētu va
sundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*]
Digital edition of SII 9.100 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
